# CLKComplicationTemplateModularSmallStackText

**Class**

A template for displaying two strings stacked one on top of the other.

## Declaration

```swift
class CLKComplicationTemplateModularSmallStackText
```

## Overview

This template belongs to the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationFamily/modularSmall] family.



## Creating the Template

- **init(line1TextProvider:line2TextProvider:)**: Creates a new template that has two lines of text.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **line1TextProvider**: The text to display on the top line of the complication.
- **line2TextProvider**: The text to display on the bottom line of the complication.
- **highlightLine2**: A Boolean value indicating which line should be drawn with a highlight.

## Text templates

- **CLKComplicationTemplateModularSmallColumnsText**: A template for displaying two rows and two columns of text.
- **CLKComplicationTemplateModularSmallRingText**: A template for displaying text encircled by a configurable progress ring.
- **CLKComplicationTemplateModularSmallSimpleText**: A template for displaying a small amount of text.

## Inherits From

- CLKComplicationTemplate

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
